title: The Arrival of the Princess 🍼
description: The day our lives changed forever. A tiny bundle of joy arrived, bringing endless smiles and a new definition of love.

title: First Day of School 🎒
description: Pigtails, an oversized school bag, and a few tears. You stepped into the big world, holding my finger tight.

title: The Mischievous Partner 🤫
description: From stealing chocolates to covering up each other's secrets. Our bond became unbreakable.

title: Growing into a Leader 🌟
description: Entering high school, discovering new talents, and making us proud with your academic and creative feats.

title: Stepping into Adulthood 🎓
description: Graduating school, standing tall, and ready to chase big dreams. The world is yours to conquer!

title: My Best Friend Forever ❤️
description: No matter how big you get, you'll always be my little sister, my guide, and my constant source of happiness.
